## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)

## Tests

- [ ] I added or updated tests for my change
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-no-pii.sh` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally

## Docs

- [ ] Updated relevant files in `docs/` if user-visible
- [ ] Added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible

## Notes for reviewers

Anything the reviewer should look at specifically, or known limitations to flag.
